name: shop-tailor
summary: A tailor's shop with bolts of cloth on shelves, a fitting mirror, a cutting table, and a sewing bench in the back. Finished garments on mannequins, pinned patterns on the walls.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: rectangle with fitting area front, cutting/sewing back

primary_palette.note: gallery-style tailor — dressed mannequins front and center

story_prompts: wedding commission — a bride at the mirror, tailor pinning, mother watching
rushed funeral order — black cloth unspooled, tailor and apprentice sewing frantically
noble's fitting — a baron on the stool, tailor measuring, guards at the door
midnight stitching — tailor alone, sewing a concealed pocket into a diplomatic coat

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright clean light (0.5) — cloth colors must be true

anti_patterns: bolts stand on end along walls, don't lay flat on the floor
cutting table is large and central — the heart of the shop
fitting mirror must be against a wall — never mid-floor
